revision.text:
{{神社| 名称=高田波蘇伎神社| 所在地=愛知県一宮市一宮市高田南屋敷116| 位置=| 祭神=[[応神天皇]] [[大綜杵命]]| 社格=式内社・旧郷社| 創建=不明| }}
'''高田波蘇伎神社'''（たかだはさぎじんじゃ）は、[[愛知県]][[一宮市]]高田にある[[神社]]。旧[[社格]]は郷社。
[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の[[尾張国]][[中島郡]]「波蘇伎神社」と推測される。
== 概況 == *創建時期は不明。 *[[室町時代]]、波蘇伎神社は衰退し、一時[[葉栗郡]]門間村の正八幡宮（現・[[伊富利部神社]]）に神体を移したという。 *[[江戸時代]]初期、波蘇伎神社跡地に[[八幡神|誉田別命]]を祀り、八幡社となる。 *[[1872年]]（明治5年）に村社、[[1932年]]（昭和7年）に郷社となる。
== 祭神 == *[[応神天皇]] *[[大綜杵命]] :大綜麻杵命（[[開化天皇]]の[[皇后]]伊香色謎命の父。[[物部氏]]の祖）と推測される。
== 交通機関 == *[[名鉄バス]]「高田」バス停下車、徒歩5分 **[[名古屋鉄道]][[名鉄名古屋本線|名古屋本線]]・[[名鉄尾西線|尾西線]][[名鉄一宮駅]]、[[東海道本線]][[尾張一宮駅]]（[[名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル]]3番のりば）より「山郷西」「[[ツインアーチ138|138タワーパーク]]」行き
{{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} [[Category:愛知県の神社]] [[Category:式内小社]] [[Category:郷社]] [[Category:一宮市]] {{shinto-stub}}

== 祭神 == *[[応神天皇]] *[[大綜杵命]] :大綜麻杵命（[[開化天皇]]の[[皇后]]伊香色謎命の父。[[物部氏]]の祖）と推測される。
== 交通機関 == *[[名鉄バス]]「高田」バス停下車、徒歩5分 **[[名古屋鉄道]][[名鉄名古屋本線|名古屋本線]]・[[名鉄尾西線|尾西線]][[名鉄一宮駅]]、[[東海道本線]][[尾張一宮駅]]（[[名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル]]3番のりば）より「山郷西」「[[ツインアーチ138|138タワーパーク]]」行き

== 祭神 == *[[応神天皇]] *[[大綜杵|大綜杵命]] :[[大綜麻杵命]]（[[開化天皇]]の[[皇后]][[伊香色謎命]]の父。[[物部氏]]の祖）と推測される。
== 交通機関 == *[[名鉄バス]]「高田」バス停下車、徒歩5分 **[[名古屋鉄道]][[名鉄名古屋本線|名古屋本線]]・[[名鉄尾西線|尾西線]][[名鉄一宮駅]]、[[東海道本線]][[尾張一宮駅]]（[[名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル]]3番のりば）より「山郷西」「[[ツインアーチ138|138タワーパーク]]」行き
{{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]]

{{nihongo|'''Takadahasagi Shrine'''|高田波蘇伎神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takadahasagi Shrine'''|高田波蘇伎神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takadahasagi Shrine'''|高田波蘇伎神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takadahasagi Shrine'''|高田波蘇伎神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takadahasagi Shrine'''|高田波蘇伎神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takadahasagi Shrine'''|高田波蘇伎神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takadahasagi Shrine'''|高田波蘇伎神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takadahasagi Shrine'''|高田波蘇伎神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takadahasagi Shrine'''|高田波蘇伎神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takadahasagi Shrine'''|高田波蘇伎神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takadahasagi Shrine'''|高田波蘇伎神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takadahasagi Shrine'''|高田波蘇伎神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takadahasagi Shrine'''|高田波蘇伎神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takadahasagi Shrine'''|高田波蘇伎神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takadahasagi Shrine'''|高田波蘇伎神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takadahasagi Shrine'''|高田波蘇伎神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takadahasagi Shrine'''|高田波蘇伎神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takadahasagi Shrine'''|高田波蘇伎神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

revision.comment: 17 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{出典の明記|date=2014年10月27日 (月) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = 高田波蘇伎神社 | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 | 所在地 = [[愛知県]][[一宮市]][[高田 (一宮市)|高田]]南屋敷116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = [[応神天皇]]、[[大綜杵命]] | 社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[郷社]] | 創建 = 不明 | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=高田
波蘇伎神社|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''高田波蘇伎神社'''（たかだはさぎじんじゃ）は、[[愛知県]][[一宮市]][[高田 (一宮市)|高田]]にある[[神社]]。旧[[社格]]は[[郷社]]。 [[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の[[尾張国]][[中島郡]]「波蘇伎神社」と推測される。 == 概況 == *創建時期は不明。 *[[室町時代]]、波蘇伎神社は衰退し、一時[[葉栗郡]]門間村の正八幡宮（現・[[伊富利部神社]]）に神体を移したという。 *[[江戸時代]]初期、波蘇伎神社跡地に[[八幡神|誉田別命]]を祀り、八幡社となる。 *[[1872年]]（明治5年）に村社、[[1932年]]（昭和7年）に郷社となる。 == 祭神 == *[[応神天皇]] *[[大綜杵命]] *:[[開化天皇]]の[[皇后]]・[[伊香色謎命]]の父で[[物部氏|物部連]]の祖とされる。 == 交通機関 == *[[名鉄バス]]「高田」バス停下車、徒歩5分 **[[名古屋鉄道]][[名鉄名古屋本線|名古屋本線]]・[[名鉄尾西線|尾西線]][[名鉄一宮駅]]、[[東海道本線]][[尾張一宮駅]]（[[名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル]]3番のりば）より「山郷西」「[[ツインアーチ138|138タワーパーク]]」行き == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]]

page|ja|高田波蘇伎神社|version=107182653|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{出典の明記|date=2014年10月27日 (月) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = 高田波蘇伎神社 | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 | 所在地 = [[愛知県]][[一宮市]][[高田 (一宮市)|高田]]南屋敷116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = [[応神天皇]]、[[大綜杵命]] | 社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[郷社]] | 創建 = 不明 | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=高田
波蘇伎神社|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''高田波蘇伎神社'''（たかだはさぎじんじゃ）は、[[愛知県]][[一宮市]][[高田 (一宮市)|高田]]にある[[神社]]。旧[[社格]]は[[郷社]]。 [[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の[[尾張国]][[中島郡]]「波蘇伎神社」と推測される。 == 概況 == *創建時期は不明。 *[[室町時代]]、波蘇伎神社は衰退し、一時[[葉栗郡]]門間村の正八幡宮（現・[[伊富利部神社]]）に神体を移したという。 *[[江戸時代]]初期、波蘇伎神社跡地に[[八幡神|誉田別命]]を祀り、八幡社となる。 *[[1872年]]（明治5年）に村社、[[1932年]]（昭和7年）に郷社となる。 == 祭神 == *[[応神天皇]] *[[大綜杵命]] *:[[開化天皇]]の[[皇后]]・[[伊香色謎命]]の父で[[物部氏|物部連]]の祖とされる。 == 交通機関 == *[[名鉄バス]]「高田」バス停下車、徒歩5分 **[[名古屋鉄道]][[名鉄名古屋本線|名古屋本線]]・[[名鉄尾西線|尾西線]][[名鉄一宮駅]]、[[東海道本線]][[尾張一宮駅]]（[[名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル]]3番のりば）より「山郷西」「[[ツインアーチ138|138タワーパーク]]」行き == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] ==End Japanese==

page|ja|高田波蘇伎神社|version=107182653|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{出典の明記|date=2014年10月27日 (月) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = 高田波蘇伎神社 | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 | 所在地 = [[愛知県]][[一宮市]][[高田 (一宮市)|高田]]南屋敷116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = [[応神天皇]]、[[大綜杵命]] | 社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[郷社]] | 創建 = 不明 | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=高田
波蘇伎神社|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''高田波蘇伎神社'''（たかだはさぎじんじゃ）は、[[愛知県]][[一宮市]][[高田 (一宮市)|高田]]にある[[神社]]。旧[[社格]]は[[郷社]]。 [[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の[[尾張国]][[中島郡]]「波蘇伎神社」と推測される。 == 概況 == *創建時期は不明。 *[[室町時代]]、波蘇伎神社は衰退し、一時[[葉栗郡]]門間村の正八幡宮（現・[[伊富利部神社]]）に神体を移したという。 *[[江戸時代]]初期、波蘇伎神社跡地に[[八幡神|誉田別命]]を祀り、八幡社となる。 *[[1872年]]（明治5年）に村社、[[1932年]]（昭和7年）に郷社となる。 == 祭神 == *[[応神天皇]] *[[大綜杵命]] *:[[開化天皇]]の[[皇后]]・[[伊香色謎命]]の父で[[物部氏|物部連]]の祖とされる。 == 交通機関 == *[[名鉄バス]]「高田」バス停下車、徒歩5分 **[[名古屋鉄道]][[名鉄名古屋本線|名古屋本線]]・[[名鉄尾西線|尾西線]][[名鉄一宮駅]]、[[東海道本線]][[尾張一宮駅]]（[[名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル]]3番のりば）より「山郷西」「[[ツインアーチ138|138タワーパーク]]」行き == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]]

[[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|高田波蘇伎神社|version=107182653|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{出典の明記|date=2014年10月27日 (月) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = 高田波蘇伎神社 | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 | 所在地 = {{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|一宮市|Q270810}}{{jalink|高田 (一宮市)|Q128848560|高田}}南屋敷116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}}、{{jalink|大綜杵命}} | 社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|郷社}} | 創建 = 不明 | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=高田
波蘇伎神社|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''高田波蘇伎神社'''（たかだはさぎじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|一宮市|Q270810}}{{jalink|高田 (一宮市)|Q128848560|高田}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|郷社}}。 {{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|式内社}}の{{jalink|尾張国|Q514506}}{{jalink|中島郡|Q780420}}「波蘇伎神社」と推測される。 == 概況 == *創建時期は不明。 *{{jalink|室町時代|Q334845}}、波蘇伎神社は衰退し、一時{{jalink|葉栗郡|Q1032507}}門間村の正八幡宮（現・{{jalink|伊富利部神社|Q11379320}}）に神体を移したという。 *{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}初期、波蘇伎神社跡地に{{jalink|八幡神|Q261637|誉田別命}}を祀り、八幡社となる。 *{{jalink|1872年|Q7753}}（明治5年）に村社、{{jalink|1932年|Q18743}}（昭和7年）に郷社となる。 == 祭神 == *{{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}} *{{jalink|大綜杵命}} *:{{jalink|開化天皇|Q333548}}の{{jalink|皇后|Q7723211}}・{{jalink|伊香色謎命|Q10885176}}の父で{{jalink|物部氏|Q1755836|物部連}}の祖とされる。 == 交通機関 == *{{jalink|名鉄バス|Q6810397}}「高田」バス停下車、徒歩5分 **{{jalink|名古屋鉄道|Q30850}}{{jalink|名鉄名古屋本線|Q1137838|名古屋本線}}・{{jalink|名鉄尾西線|Q901005|尾西線}}{{jalink|名鉄一宮駅|Q2856589}}、{{jalink|東海道本線|Q1190152}}{{jalink|尾張一宮駅|Q871495}}（{{jalink|名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル}}3番のりば）より「山郷西」「{{jalink|ツインアーチ138|Q11318660|138タワーパーク}}」行き == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]]

{{nihongo|'''Takadahasagi Shrine'''|高田波蘇伎神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takadahasagi Shrine'''|高田波蘇伎神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6180005009988 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市高田南屋敷116', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2014年10月27日 (月) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = 高田波蘇伎神社 | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 | 所在地 = {{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|一宮市|Q270810}}{{jalink|高田 (一宮市)|Q128848560|高田}}南屋敷116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}}、{{jalink|大綜杵命}} | 社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} | 創建 = 不明 | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=高田
波蘇伎神社|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''高田波蘇伎神社'''（たかだはさぎじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|一宮市|Q270810}}{{jalink|高田 (一宮市)|Q128848560|高田}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。 {{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|式内社}}の{{jalink|尾張国|Q514506}}{{jalink|中島郡|Q780420}}「波蘇伎神社」と推測される。 === 概況 === *創建時期は不明。 *{{jalink|室町時代|Q334845}}、波蘇伎神社は衰退し、一時{{jalink|葉栗郡|Q1032507}}門間村の正八幡宮（現・{{jalink|伊富利部神社|Q11379320}}）に神体を移したという。 *{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}初期、波蘇伎神社跡地に{{jalink|八幡神|Q261637|誉田別命}}を祀り、八幡社となる。 *{{jalink|1872年|Q7753}}（明治5年）に村社、{{jalink|1932年|Q18743}}（昭和7年）に郷社となる。 === 祭神 === *{{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}} *{{jalink|大綜杵命}} *:{{jalink|開化天皇|Q333548}}の{{jalink|皇后|Q7723211}}・{{jalink|伊香色謎命|Q10885176}}の父で{{jalink|物部氏|Q1755836|物部連}}の祖とされる。 === 交通機関 === *{{jalink|名鉄バス|Q6810397}}「高田」バス停下車、徒歩5分 **{{jalink|名古屋鉄道|Q30850}}{{jalink|名鉄名古屋本線|Q1137838|名古屋本線}}・{{jalink|名鉄尾西線|Q901005|尾西線}}{{jalink|名鉄一宮駅|Q2856589}}、{{jalink|東海道本線|Q1190152}}{{jalink|尾張一宮駅|Q871495}}（{{jalink|名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル}}3番のりば）より「山郷西」「{{jalink|ツインアーチ138|Q11318660|138タワーパーク}}」行き === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]]

Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6180005009988 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市高田南屋敷116', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2014年10月27日 (月) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = 高田波蘇伎神社 | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 | 所在地 = {{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|一宮市|Q270810}}{{jalink|高田 (一宮市)|Q128848560|高田}}南屋敷116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}}、{{jalink|大綜杵命}} | 社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} | 創建 = 不明 | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=高田
波蘇伎神社|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''高田波蘇伎神社'''（たかだはさぎじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|一宮市|Q270810}}{{jalink|高田 (一宮市)|Q128848560|高田}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。 {{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|式内社}}の{{jalink|尾張国|Q514506}}{{jalink|中島郡|Q780420}}「波蘇伎神社」と推測される。 === 概況 === *創建時期は不明。 *{{jalink|室町時代|Q334845}}、波蘇伎神社は衰退し、一時{{jalink|葉栗郡|Q1032507}}門間村の正八幡宮（現・{{jalink|伊富利部神社|Q11379320}}）に神体を移したという。 *{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}初期、波蘇伎神社跡地に{{jalink|八幡神|Q261637|誉田別命}}を祀り、八幡社となる。 *{{jalink|1872年|Q7753}}（明治5年）に村社、{{jalink|1932年|Q18743}}（昭和7年）に郷社となる。 === 祭神 === *{{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}} *{{jalink|大綜杵命}} *:{{jalink|開化天皇|Q333548}}の{{jalink|皇后|Q7723211}}・{{jalink|伊香色謎命|Q10885176}}の父で{{jalink|物部氏|Q1755836|物部連}}の祖とされる。 === 交通機関 === *{{jalink|名鉄バス|Q6810397}}「高田」バス停下車、徒歩5分 **{{jalink|名古屋鉄道|Q30850}}{{jalink|名鉄名古屋本線|Q1137838|名古屋本線}}・{{jalink|名鉄尾西線|Q901005|尾西線}}{{jalink|名鉄一宮駅|Q2856589}}、{{jalink|東海道本線|Q1190152}}{{jalink|尾張一宮駅|Q871495}}（{{jalink|名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル}}3番のりば）より「山郷西」「{{jalink|ツインアーチ138|Q11318660|138タワーパーク}}」行き === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6180005009988 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市高田南屋敷116', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2014年10月27日 (月) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = 高田波蘇伎神社 | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 | 所在地 = {{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|一宮市|Q270810}}{{jalink|高田 (一宮市)|Q128848560|高田}}南屋敷116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}}、{{jalink|大綜杵命}} | 社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} | 創建 = 不明 | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=高田
波蘇伎神社|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''高田波蘇伎神社'''（たかだはさぎじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|一宮市|Q270810}}{{jalink|高田 (一宮市)|Q128848560|高田}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。 {{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|式内社}}の{{jalink|尾張国|Q514506}}{{jalink|中島郡|Q780420}}「波蘇伎神社」と推測される。 === 概況 === *創建時期は不明。 *{{jalink|室町時代|Q334845}}、波蘇伎神社は衰退し、一時{{jalink|葉栗郡|Q1032507}}門間村の正八幡宮（現・{{jalink|伊富利部神社|Q11379320}}）に神体を移したという。 *{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}初期、波蘇伎神社跡地に{{jalink|八幡神|Q261637|誉田別命}}を祀り、八幡社となる。 *{{jalink|1872年|Q7753}}（明治5年）に村社、{{jalink|1932年|Q18743}}（昭和7年）に郷社となる。 === 祭神 === *{{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}} *{{jalink|大綜杵命}} *:{{jalink|開化天皇|Q333548}}の{{jalink|皇后|Q7723211}}・{{jalink|伊香色謎命|Q10885176}}の父で{{jalink|物部氏|Q1755836|物部連}}の祖とされる。 === 交通機関 === *{{jalink|名鉄バス|Q6810397}}「高田」バス停下車、徒歩5分 **{{jalink|名古屋鉄道|Q30850}}{{jalink|名鉄名古屋本線|Q1137838|名古屋本線}}・{{jalink|名鉄尾西線|Q901005|尾西線}}{{jalink|名鉄一宮駅|Q2856589}}、{{jalink|東海道本線|Q1190152}}{{jalink|尾張一宮駅|Q871495}}（{{jalink|名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル}}3番のりば）より「山郷西」「{{jalink|ツインアーチ138|Q11318660|138タワーパーク}}」行き === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6180005009988 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市高田南屋敷116', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2014年10月27日 (月) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = 高田波蘇伎神社 | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 | 所在地 = {{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|一宮市|Q270810}}{{jalink|高田 (一宮市)|Q128848560|高田}}南屋敷116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}}、{{jalink|大綜杵命}} | 社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} | 創建 = 不明 | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=高田
波蘇伎神社|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''高田波蘇伎神社'''（たかだはさぎじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|一宮市|Q270810}}{{jalink|高田 (一宮市)|Q128848560|高田}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。 {{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|式内社}}の{{jalink|尾張国|Q514506}}{{jalink|中島郡|Q780420}}「波蘇伎神社」と推測される。 === 概況 === *創建時期は不明。 *{{jalink|室町時代|Q334845}}、波蘇伎神社は衰退し、一時{{jalink|葉栗郡|Q1032507}}門間村の正八幡宮（現・{{jalink|伊富利部神社|Q11379320}}）に神体を移したという。 *{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}初期、波蘇伎神社跡地に{{jalink|八幡神|Q261637|誉田別命}}を祀り、八幡社となる。 *{{jalink|1872年|Q7753}}（明治5年）に村社、{{jalink|1932年|Q18743}}（昭和7年）に郷社となる。 === 祭神 === *{{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}} *{{jalink|大綜杵命}} *:{{jalink|開化天皇|Q333548}}の{{jalink|皇后|Q7723211}}・{{jalink|伊香色謎命|Q10885176}}の父で{{jalink|物部氏|Q1755836|物部連}}の祖とされる。 === 交通機関 === *{{jalink|名鉄バス|Q6810397}}「高田」バス停下車、徒歩5分 **{{jalink|名古屋鉄道|Q30850}}{{jalink|名鉄名古屋本線|Q1137838|名古屋本線}}・{{jalink|名鉄尾西線|Q901005|尾西線}}{{jalink|名鉄一宮駅|Q2856589}}、{{jalink|東海道本線|Q1190152}}{{jalink|尾張一宮駅|Q871495}}（{{jalink|名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル}}3番のりば）より「山郷西」「{{jalink|ツインアーチ138|Q11318660|138タワーパーク}}」行き === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6180005009988 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市高田南屋敷116', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2014年10月27日 (月) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = 高田波蘇伎神社 | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 | 所在地 = {{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|一宮市|Q270810}}{{jalink|高田 (一宮市)|Q128848560|高田}}南屋敷116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}}、{{jalink|大綜杵命}} | 社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} | 創建 = 不明 | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=高田
波蘇伎神社|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''高田波蘇伎神社'''（たかだはさぎじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|一宮市|Q270810}}{{jalink|高田 (一宮市)|Q128848560|高田}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。 {{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|式内社}}の{{jalink|尾張国|Q514506}}{{jalink|中島郡|Q780420}}「波蘇伎神社」と推測される。 === 概況 === *創建時期は不明。 *{{jalink|室町時代|Q334845}}、波蘇伎神社は衰退し、一時{{jalink|葉栗郡|Q1032507}}門間村の正八幡宮（現・{{jalink|伊富利部神社|Q11379320}}）に神体を移したという。 *{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}初期、波蘇伎神社跡地に{{jalink|八幡神|Q261637|誉田別命}}を祀り、八幡社となる。 *{{jalink|1872年|Q7753}}（明治5年）に村社、{{jalink|1932年|Q18743}}（昭和7年）に郷社となる。 === 祭神 === *{{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}} *{{jalink|大綜杵命}} *:{{jalink|開化天皇|Q333548}}の{{jalink|皇后|Q7723211}}・{{jalink|伊香色謎命|Q10885176}}の父で{{jalink|物部氏|Q1755836|物部連}}の祖とされる。 === 交通機関 === *{{jalink|名鉄バス|Q6810397}}「高田」バス停下車、徒歩5分 **{{jalink|名古屋鉄道|Q30850}}{{jalink|名鉄名古屋本線|Q1137838|名古屋本線}}・{{jalink|名鉄尾西線|Q901005|尾西線}}{{jalink|名鉄一宮駅|Q2856589}}、{{jalink|東海道本線|Q1190152}}{{jalink|尾張一宮駅|Q871495}}（{{jalink|名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル}}3番のりば）より「山郷西」「{{jalink|ツインアーチ138|Q11318660|138タワーパーク}}」行き === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6180005009988 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市高田南屋敷116', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2014年10月27日 (月) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = 高田波蘇伎神社 | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 | 所在地 = {{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|一宮市|Q270810}}{{jalink|高田 (一宮市)|Q128848560|高田}}南屋敷116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}}、{{jalink|大綜杵命}} | 社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} | 創建 = 不明 | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=高田
波蘇伎神社|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''高田波蘇伎神社'''（たかだはさぎじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|一宮市|Q270810}}{{jalink|高田 (一宮市)|Q128848560|高田}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。 {{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|式内社}}の{{jalink|尾張国|Q514506}}{{jalink|中島郡|Q780420}}「波蘇伎神社」と推測される。 === 概況 === *創建時期は不明。 *{{jalink|室町時代|Q334845}}、波蘇伎神社は衰退し、一時{{jalink|葉栗郡|Q1032507}}門間村の正八幡宮（現・{{jalink|伊富利部神社|Q11379320}}）に神体を移したという。 *{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}初期、波蘇伎神社跡地に{{jalink|八幡神|Q261637|誉田別命}}を祀り、八幡社となる。 *{{jalink|1872年|Q7753}}（明治5年）に村社、{{jalink|1932年|Q18743}}（昭和7年）に郷社となる。 === 祭神 === *{{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}} *{{jalink|大綜杵命}} *:{{jalink|開化天皇|Q333548}}の{{jalink|皇后|Q7723211}}・{{jalink|伊香色謎命|Q10885176}}の父で{{jalink|物部氏|Q1755836|物部連}}の祖とされる。 === 交通機関 === *{{jalink|名鉄バス|Q6810397}}「高田」バス停下車、徒歩5分 **{{jalink|名古屋鉄道|Q30850}}{{jalink|名鉄名古屋本線|Q1137838|名古屋本線}}・{{jalink|名鉄尾西線|Q901005|尾西線}}{{jalink|名鉄一宮駅|Q2856589}}、{{jalink|東海道本線|Q1190152}}{{jalink|尾張一宮駅|Q871495}}（{{jalink|名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル}}3番のりば）より「山郷西」「{{jalink|ツインアーチ138|Q11318660|138タワーパーク}}」行き === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{出典の明記|date=27 October 2014 (Mon) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = Takadahasagi Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}{{jalink|Ichinomiya|Q270810}}{{jalink|Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|Takada}} Minamiyashiki 116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997}}, {{jalink|Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto}} | 社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, former {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}} | 創建 = unknown | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Takada
Hasagi Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takadahasagi Shrine''' (たかだはさぎじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|Takada}}, {{jalink|Ichinomiya|Q270810}}, {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}. Its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}. It is presumed to correspond to "Hasagi Shrine" in Nakashima District of {{jalink|Owari Province|Q514506}} listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|Shikinaisha register}}. === Overview === *Founding period unknown. *In the {{jalink|Muromachi period|Q334845}}, Hasagi Shrine declined and the sacred body was temporarily moved to Shōhachimangū in Monma Village of {{jalink|Haguri District|Q1032507}} (now {{jalink|Ifuribe Shrine|Q11379320}}). *In the early {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}, {{jalink|Hachiman|Q261637|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} was enshrined at the former Hasagi Shrine site, and it became Hachiman-sha. *In {{jalink|1872|Q7753}} (Meiji 5) it became a village shrine, and in {{jalink|1932|Q18743}} (Shōwa 7) it became a gōsha. === Enshrined deities === *{{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997}} *{{jalink|Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto}} *:Said to be the father of {{jalink|Ikagashikome-no-Mikoto|Q10885176}}, {{jalink|empress|Q7723211}} of {{jalink|Emperor Kaika|Q333548}}, and regarded as ancestor of the {{jalink|Mononobe clan|Q1755836|Mononobe no Muraji}}. === Transportation === *5 minutes on foot from "Takada" bus stop on {{jalink|Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397}} **From {{jalink|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589}} / {{jalink|Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495}} (platform 3 of Meitetsu Ichinomiya bus terminal): bound for "Yamasato Nishi" or "{{jalink|Twin Arch 138|Q11318660|138 Tower Park}}" === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{出典の明記|date=27 October 2014 (Mon) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = Takadahasagi Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}{{jalink|Ichinomiya|Q270810}}{{jalink|Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|Takada}} Minamiyashiki 116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997}}, {{jalink|Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto}} | 社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, former {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}} | 創建 = unknown | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Takada
Hasagi Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takadahasagi Shrine''' (たかだはさぎじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|Takada}}, {{jalink|Ichinomiya|Q270810}}, {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}. Its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}. It is presumed to correspond to "Hasagi Shrine" in Nakashima District of {{jalink|Owari Province|Q514506}} listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|Shikinaisha register}}. === Overview === *Founding period unknown. *In the {{jalink|Muromachi period|Q334845}}, Hasagi Shrine declined and the sacred body was temporarily moved to Shōhachimangū in Monma Village of {{jalink|Haguri District|Q1032507}} (now {{jalink|Ifuribe Shrine|Q11379320}}). *In the early {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}, {{jalink|Hachiman|Q261637|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} was enshrined at the former Hasagi Shrine site, and it became Hachiman-sha. *In {{jalink|1872|Q7753}} (Meiji 5) it became a village shrine, and in {{jalink|1932|Q18743}} (Shōwa 7) it became a gōsha. === Enshrined deities === *{{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997}} *{{jalink|Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto}} *:Said to be the father of {{jalink|Ikagashikome-no-Mikoto|Q10885176}}, {{jalink|empress|Q7723211}} of {{jalink|Emperor Kaika|Q333548}}, and regarded as ancestor of the {{jalink|Mononobe clan|Q1755836|Mononobe no Muraji}}. === Transportation === *5 minutes on foot from "Takada" bus stop on {{jalink|Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397}} **From {{jalink|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589}} / {{jalink|Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495}} (platform 3 of Meitetsu Ichinomiya bus terminal): bound for "Yamasato Nishi" or "{{jalink|Twin Arch 138|Q11318660|138 Tower Park}}" === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Ollama and DeepSeek were too bad to actually use. see categorization since some of them are very questionable, especially if there was a massive decrease in page size or the {{jawiki| template is minimal or absent on the page

Torii | 所在地 = {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}{{jalink|Ichinomiya|Q270810}}{{jalink|Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|Takada}} Minamiyashiki 116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997}}, {{jalink|Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto}} | 社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, former {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}} | 創建 = unknown | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Takada
Hasagi Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takadahasagi Shrine''' (たかだはさぎじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|Takada}}, {{jalink|Ichinomiya|Q270810}}, {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}. Its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}. It is presumed to correspond to "Hasagi Shrine" in Nakashima District of {{jalink|Owari Province|Q514506}} listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|Shikinaisha register}}. === Overview === *Founding period unknown. *In the {{jalink|Muromachi period|Q334845}}, Hasagi Shrine declined and the sacred body was temporarily moved to Shōhachimangū in Monma Village of {{jalink|Haguri District|Q1032507}} (now {{jalink|Ifuribe Shrine|Q11379320}}). *In the early {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}, {{jalink|Hachiman|Q261637|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} was enshrined at the former Hasagi Shrine site, and it became Hachiman-sha. *In {{jalink|1872|Q7753}} (Meiji 5) it became a village shrine, and in {{jalink|1932|Q18743}} (Shōwa 7) it became a gōsha. === Enshrined deities === *{{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997}} *{{jalink|Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto}} *:Said to be the father of {{jalink|Ikagashikome-no-Mikoto|Q10885176}}, {{jalink|empress|Q7723211}} of {{jalink|Emperor Kaika|Q333548}}, and regarded as ancestor of the {{jalink|Mononobe clan|Q1755836|Mononobe no Muraji}}. === Transportation === *5 minutes on foot from "Takada" bus stop on {{jalink|Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397}} **From {{jalink|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589}} / {{jalink|Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495}} (platform 3 of Meitetsu Ichinomiya bus terminal): bound for "Yamasato Nishi" or "{{jalink|Twin Arch 138|Q11318660|138 Tower Park}}" === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6180005009988 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市高田南屋敷116', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=27 October 2014 (Mon) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = Takadahasagi Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}{{jalink|Ichinomiya|Q270810}}{{jalink|Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|Takada}} Minamiyashiki 116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997}}, {{jalink|Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto}} | 社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, former {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}} | 創建 = unknown | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Takada
Hasagi Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takadahasagi Shrine''' (たかだはさぎじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|Takada}}, {{jalink|Ichinomiya|Q270810}}, {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}. Its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}. It is presumed to correspond to "Hasagi Shrine" in Nakashima District of {{jalink|Owari Province|Q514506}} listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|Shikinaisha register}}. === Overview === *Founding period unknown. *In the {{jalink|Muromachi period|Q334845}}, Hasagi Shrine declined and the sacred body was temporarily moved to Shōhachimangū in Monma Village of {{jalink|Haguri District|Q1032507}} (now {{jalink|Ifuribe Shrine|Q11379320}}). *In the early {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}, {{jalink|Hachiman|Q261637|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} was enshrined at the former Hasagi Shrine site, and it became Hachiman-sha. *In {{jalink|1872|Q7753}} (Meiji 5) it became a village shrine, and in {{jalink|1932|Q18743}} (Shōwa 7) it became a gōsha. === Enshrined deities === *{{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997}} *{{jalink|Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto}} *:Said to be the father of {{jalink|Ikagashikome-no-Mikoto|Q10885176}}, {{jalink|empress|Q7723211}} of {{jalink|Emperor Kaika|Q333548}}, and regarded as ancestor of the {{jalink|Mononobe clan|Q1755836|Mononobe no Muraji}}. === Transportation === *5 minutes on foot from "Takada" bus stop on {{jalink|Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397}} **From {{jalink|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589}} / {{jalink|Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495}} (platform 3 of Meitetsu Ichinomiya bus terminal): bound for "Yamasato Nishi" or "{{jalink|Twin Arch 138|Q11318660|138 Tower Park}}" === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]]

Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6180005009988 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市高田南屋敷116', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=27 October 2014 (Mon) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = Takadahasagi Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}{{jalink|Ichinomiya|Q270810}}{{jalink|Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|Takada}} Minamiyashiki 116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997}}, {{jalink|Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto}} | 社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, former {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}} | 創建 = unknown | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Takada
Hasagi Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takadahasagi Shrine''' (たかだはさぎじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|Takada}}, {{jalink|Ichinomiya|Q270810}}, {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}. Its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}. It is presumed to correspond to "Hasagi Shrine" in Nakashima District of {{jalink|Owari Province|Q514506}} listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|Shikinaisha register}}. === Overview === *Founding period unknown. *In the {{jalink|Muromachi period|Q334845}}, Hasagi Shrine declined and the sacred body was temporarily moved to Shōhachimangū in Monma Village of {{jalink|Haguri District|Q1032507}} (now {{jalink|Ifuribe Shrine|Q11379320}}). *In the early {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}, {{jalink|Hachiman|Q261637|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} was enshrined at the former Hasagi Shrine site, and it became Hachiman-sha. *In {{jalink|1872|Q7753}} (Meiji 5) it became a village shrine, and in {{jalink|1932|Q18743}} (Shōwa 7) it became a gōsha. === Enshrined deities === *{{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997}} *{{jalink|Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto}} *:Said to be the father of {{jalink|Ikagashikome-no-Mikoto|Q10885176}}, {{jalink|empress|Q7723211}} of {{jalink|Emperor Kaika|Q333548}}, and regarded as ancestor of the {{jalink|Mononobe clan|Q1755836|Mononobe no Muraji}}. === Transportation === *5 minutes on foot from "Takada" bus stop on {{jalink|Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397}} **From {{jalink|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589}} / {{jalink|Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495}} (platform 3 of Meitetsu Ichinomiya bus terminal): bound for "Yamasato Nishi" or "{{jalink|Twin Arch 138|Q11318660|138 Tower Park}}" === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]][[Category:qq]]

Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6180005009988 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市高田南屋敷116', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=27 October 2014 (Mon) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = Takadahasagi Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}{{jalink|Ichinomiya|Q270810}}{{jalink|Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|Takada}} Minamiyashiki 116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997}}, {{jalink|Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto}} | 社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, former {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}} | 創建 = unknown | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Takada
Hasagi Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takadahasagi Shrine''' (たかだはさぎじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|Takada}}, {{jalink|Ichinomiya|Q270810}}, {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}. Its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}. It is presumed to correspond to "Hasagi Shrine" in Nakashima District of {{jalink|Owari Province|Q514506}} listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|Shikinaisha register}}. === Overview === *Founding period unknown. *In the {{jalink|Muromachi period|Q334845}}, Hasagi Shrine declined and the sacred body was temporarily moved to Shōhachimangū in Monma Village of {{jalink|Haguri District|Q1032507}} (now {{jalink|Ifuribe Shrine|Q11379320}}). *In the early {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}, {{jalink|Hachiman|Q261637|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} was enshrined at the former Hasagi Shrine site, and it became Hachiman-sha. *In {{jalink|1872|Q7753}} (Meiji 5) it became a village shrine, and in {{jalink|1932|Q18743}} (Shōwa 7) it became a gōsha. === Enshrined deities === *{{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997}} *{{jalink|Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto}} *:Said to be the father of {{jalink|Ikagashikome-no-Mikoto|Q10885176}}, {{jalink|empress|Q7723211}} of {{jalink|Emperor Kaika|Q333548}}, and regarded as ancestor of the {{jalink|Mononobe clan|Q1755836|Mononobe no Muraji}}. === Transportation === *5 minutes on foot from "Takada" bus stop on {{jalink|Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397}} **From {{jalink|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589}} / {{jalink|Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495}} (platform 3 of Meitetsu Ichinomiya bus terminal): bound for "Yamasato Nishi" or "{{jalink|Twin Arch 138|Q11318660|138 Tower Park}}" === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6180005009988 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市高田南屋敷116', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=27 October 2014 (Mon) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = Takadahasagi Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434}}{{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810}}{{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada}} Minamiyashiki 116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997}}, {{ill||lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}} | 社格 = {{ill||lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} | 創建 = unknown | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Takada
Hasagi Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takadahasagi Shrine''' (たかだはさぎじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada}}, {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434}}. Its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}. It is presumed to correspond to "Hasagi Shrine" in Nakashima District of {{ill|lt=Owari Province|Q514506|WD=Q514506}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register}}. === Overview === *Founding period unknown. *In the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|WD=Q334845}}, Hasagi Shrine declined and the sacred body was temporarily moved to Shōhachimangū in Monma Village of {{ill|lt=Haguri District|Q1032507|WD=Q1032507}} (now {{ill|lt=Ifuribe Shrine|Q11379320|WD=Q11379320}}). *In the early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}}, {{ill|lt=Hachiman|Q261637|WD=Q261637|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} was enshrined at the former Hasagi Shrine site, and it became Hachiman-sha. *In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753}} (Meiji 5) it became a village shrine, and in {{ill|lt=1932|Q18743|WD=Q18743}} (Shōwa 7) it became a gōsha. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997}} *{{ill||lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}} *:Said to be the father of {{ill|lt=Ikagashikome-no-Mikoto|Q10885176|WD=Q10885176}}, {{ill|lt=empress|Q7723211|WD=Q7723211}} of {{ill|lt=Emperor Kaika|Q333548|WD=Q333548}}, and regarded as ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Mononobe clan|Q1755836|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe no Muraji}}. === Transportation === *5 minutes on foot from "Takada" bus stop on {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397|WD=Q6810397}} **From {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589|WD=Q2856589}} / {{ill|lt=Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495|WD=Q871495}} (platform 3 of Meitetsu Ichinomiya bus terminal): bound for "Yamasato Nishi" or "{{ill|lt=Twin Arch 138|Q11318660|WD=Q11318660|lt=138 Tower Park}}" === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434}}{{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810}}{{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada}} Minamiyashiki 116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}} | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} | 創建 = unknown | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Takada
Hasagi Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takadahasagi Shrine''' (たかだはさぎじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada}}, {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434}}. Its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}. It is presumed to correspond to "Hasagi Shrine" in Nakashima District of {{ill|lt=Owari Province|Q514506|WD=Q514506}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register}}. === Overview === *Founding period unknown. *In the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|WD=Q334845}}, Hasagi Shrine declined and the sacred body was temporarily moved to Shōhachimangū in Monma Village of {{ill|lt=Haguri District|Q1032507|WD=Q1032507}} (now {{ill|lt=Ifuribe Shrine|Q11379320|WD=Q11379320}}). *In the early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}}, {{ill|lt=Hachiman|Q261637|WD=Q261637|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} was enshrined at the former Hasagi Shrine site, and it became Hachiman-sha. *In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753}} (Meiji 5) it became a village shrine, and in {{ill|lt=1932|Q18743|WD=Q18743}} (Shōwa 7) it became a gōsha. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}} *:Said to be the father of {{ill|lt=Ikagashikome-no-Mikoto|Q10885176|WD=Q10885176}}, {{ill|lt=empress|Q7723211|WD=Q7723211}} of {{ill|lt=Emperor Kaika|Q333548|WD=Q333548}}, and regarded as ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Mononobe clan|Q1755836|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe no Muraji}}. === Transportation === *5 minutes on foot from "Takada" bus stop on {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397|WD=Q6810397}} **From {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589|WD=Q2856589}} / {{ill|lt=Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495|WD=Q871495}} (platform 3 of Meitetsu Ichinomiya bus terminal): bound for "Yamasato Nishi" or "{{ill|lt=Twin Arch 138|Q11318660|WD=Q11318660|lt=138 Tower Park}}" === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha Ichinomiya bus terminal): bound for "Yamasato Nishi" or "{{ill|lt=Twin Arch 138|Q11318660|WD=Q11318660|lt=138 Tower Park}}" === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6180005009988 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市高田南屋敷116', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=27 October 2014 (Mon) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = Takadahasagi Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434}}{{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810}}{{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada}} Minamiyashiki 116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} | 創建 = unknown | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Takada
Hasagi Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takadahasagi Shrine''' (たかだはさぎじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada}}, {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434}}. Its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}. It is presumed to correspond to "Hasagi Shrine" in Nakashima District of {{ill|lt=Owari Province|Q514506|WD=Q514506}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register}}. === Overview === *Founding period unknown. *In the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|WD=Q334845}}, Hasagi Shrine declined and the sacred body was temporarily moved to Shōhachimangū in Monma Village of {{ill|lt=Haguri District|Q1032507|WD=Q1032507}} (now {{ill|lt=Ifuribe Shrine|Q11379320|WD=Q11379320}}). *In the early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}}, {{ill|lt=Hachiman|Q261637|WD=Q261637|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} was enshrined at the former Hasagi Shrine site, and it became Hachiman-sha. *In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753}} (Meiji 5) it became a village shrine, and in {{ill|lt=1932|Q18743|WD=Q18743}} (Shōwa 7) it became a gōsha. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} *:Said to be the father of {{ill|lt=Ikagashikome-no-Mikoto|Q10885176|WD=Q10885176}}, {{ill|lt=empress|Q7723211|WD=Q7723211}} of {{ill|lt=Emperor Kaika|Q333548|WD=Q333548}}, and regarded as ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Mononobe clan|Q1755836|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe no Muraji}}. === Transportation === *5 minutes on foot from "Takada" bus stop on {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397|WD=Q6810397}} **From {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589|WD=Q2856589}} / {{ill|lt=Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495|WD=Q871495}} (platform 3 of Meitetsu Ichinomiya bus terminal): bound for "Yamasato Nishi" or "{{ill|lt=Twin Arch 138|Q11318660|WD=Q11318660|lt=138 Tower Park}}" === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6180005009988 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市高田南屋敷116', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=27 October 2014 (Mon) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = Takadahasagi Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434}}{{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810}}{{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada}} Minamiyashiki 116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} | 創建 = unknown | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Takada
Hasagi Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takadahasagi Shrine''' (たかだはさぎじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada}}, {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434}}. Its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}. It is presumed to correspond to "Hasagi Shrine" in Nakashima District of {{ill|lt=Owari Province|Q514506|WD=Q514506}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register}}. === Overview === *Founding period unknown. *In the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|WD=Q334845}}, Hasagi Shrine declined and the sacred body was temporarily moved to Shōhachimangū in Monma Village of {{ill|lt=Haguri District|Q1032507|WD=Q1032507}} (now {{ill|lt=Ifuribe Shrine|Q11379320|WD=Q11379320}}). *In the early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}}, {{ill|lt=Hachiman|Q261637|WD=Q261637|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} was enshrined at the former Hasagi Shrine site, and it became Hachiman-sha. *In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753}} (Meiji 5) it became a village shrine, and in {{ill|lt=1932|Q18743|WD=Q18743}} (Shōwa 7) it became a gōsha. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} *:Said to be the father of {{ill|lt=Ikagashikome-no-Mikoto|Q10885176|WD=Q10885176}}, {{ill|lt=empress|Q7723211|WD=Q7723211}} of {{ill|lt=Emperor Kaika|Q333548|WD=Q333548}}, and regarded as ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Mononobe clan|Q1755836|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe no Muraji}}. === Transportation === *5 minutes on foot from "Takada" bus stop on {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397|WD=Q6810397}} **From {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589|WD=Q2856589}} / {{ill|lt=Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495|WD=Q871495}} (platform 3 of Meitetsu Ichinomiya bus terminal): bound for "Yamasato Nishi" or "{{ill|lt=Twin Arch 138|Q11318660|WD=Q11318660|lt=138 Tower Park}}" === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6180005009988 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市高田南屋敷116', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=27 October 2014 (Mon) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = Takadahasagi Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}{{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada|1=Takada}} Minamiyashiki 116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} | 創建 = unknown | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Takada
Hasagi Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takadahasagi Shrine''' (たかだはさぎじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada|1=Takada}}, {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. Its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. It is presumed to correspond to "Hasagi Shrine" in Nakashima District of {{ill|lt=Owari Province|Q514506|WD=Q514506|1=Owari Province}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. === Overview === *Founding period unknown. *In the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|WD=Q334845|1=Muromachi period}}, Hasagi Shrine declined and the sacred body was temporarily moved to Shōhachimangū in Monma Village of {{ill|lt=Haguri District|Q1032507|WD=Q1032507|1=Haguri District}} (now {{ill|lt=Ifuribe Shrine|Q11379320|WD=Q11379320|1=Ifuribe Shrine}}). *In the early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, {{ill|lt=Hachiman|Q261637|WD=Q261637|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Hachiman}} was enshrined at the former Hasagi Shrine site, and it became Hachiman-sha. *In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}} (Meiji 5) it became a village shrine, and in {{ill|lt=1932|Q18743|WD=Q18743|1=1932}} (Shōwa 7) it became a gōsha. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} *:Said to be the father of {{ill|lt=Ikagashikome-no-Mikoto|Q10885176|WD=Q10885176|1=Ikagashikome}}, {{ill|lt=empress|Q7723211|WD=Q7723211|1=Empress consort}} of {{ill|lt=Emperor Kaika|Q333548|WD=Q333548|1=Emperor Kaika}}, and regarded as ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Mononobe clan|Q1755836|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe no Muraji|1=Mononobe clan}}. === Transportation === *5 minutes on foot from "Takada" bus stop on {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397|WD=Q6810397|1=Meitetsu Bus}} **From {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589|WD=Q2856589|1=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station}} / {{ill|lt=Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495|WD=Q871495|1=Owari-Ichinomiya Station}} (platform 3 of Meitetsu Ichinomiya bus terminal): bound for "Yamasato Nishi" or "{{ill|lt=Twin Arch 138|Q11318660|WD=Q11318660|lt=138 Tower Park|1=Twin Arch 138}}" === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

== Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6180005009988 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市高田南屋敷116', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=27 October 2014 (Mon) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = Takadahasagi Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}{{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada|1=Takada}} Minamiyashiki 116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} | 創建 = unknown | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Takada
Hasagi Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takadahasagi Shrine''' (たかだはさぎじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada|1=Takada}}, {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. Its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. It is presumed to correspond to "Hasagi Shrine" in Nakashima District of {{ill|lt=Owari Province|Q514506|WD=Q514506|1=Owari Province}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. === Overview === *Founding period unknown. *In the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|WD=Q334845|1=Muromachi period}}, Hasagi Shrine declined and the sacred body was temporarily moved to Shōhachimangū in Monma Village of {{ill|lt=Haguri District|Q1032507|WD=Q1032507|1=Haguri District}} (now {{ill|lt=Ifuribe Shrine|Q11379320|WD=Q11379320|1=Ifuribe Shrine}}). *In the early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, {{ill|lt=Hachiman|Q261637|WD=Q261637|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Hachiman}} was enshrined at the former Hasagi Shrine site, and it became Hachiman-sha. *In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}} (Meiji 5) it became a village shrine, and in {{ill|lt=1932|Q18743|WD=Q18743|1=1932}} (Shōwa 7) it became a gōsha. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} *:Said to be the father of {{ill|lt=Ikagashikome-no-Mikoto|Q10885176|WD=Q10885176|1=Ikagashikome}}, {{ill|lt=empress|Q7723211|WD=Q7723211|1=Empress consort}} of {{ill|lt=Emperor Kaika|Q333548|WD=Q333548|1=Emperor Kaika}}, and regarded as ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Mononobe clan|Q1755836|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe no Muraji|1=Mononobe clan}}. === Transportation === *5 minutes on foot from "Takada" bus stop on {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397|WD=Q6810397|1=Meitetsu Bus}} **From {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589|WD=Q2856589|1=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station}} / {{ill|lt=Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495|WD=Q871495|1=Owari-Ichinomiya Station}} (platform 3 of Meitetsu Ichinomiya bus terminal): bound for "Yamasato Nishi" or "{{ill|lt=Twin Arch 138|Q11318660|WD=Q11318660|lt=138 Tower Park|1=Twin Arch 138}}" === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

== Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6180005009988 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市高田南屋敷116', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=27 October 2014 (Mon) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = Takadahasagi Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}{{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada|1=Takada}} Minamiyashiki 116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} | 創建 = unknown | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Takada
Hasagi Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takadahasagi Shrine''' (たかだはさぎじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada|1=Takada}}, {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. Its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. It is presumed to correspond to "Hasagi Shrine" in Nakashima District of {{ill|lt=Owari Province|Q514506|WD=Q514506|1=Owari Province}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. === Overview === *Founding period unknown. *In the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|WD=Q334845|1=Muromachi period}}, Hasagi Shrine declined and the sacred body was temporarily moved to Shōhachimangū in Monma Village of {{ill|lt=Haguri District|Q1032507|WD=Q1032507|1=Haguri District}} (now {{ill|lt=Ifuribe Shrine|Q11379320|WD=Q11379320|1=Ifuribe Shrine}}). *In the early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, {{ill|lt=Hachiman|Q261637|WD=Q261637|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Hachiman}} was enshrined at the former Hasagi Shrine site, and it became Hachiman-sha. *In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}} (Meiji 5) it became a village shrine, and in {{ill|lt=1932|Q18743|WD=Q18743|1=1932}} (Shōwa 7) it became a gōsha. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} *:Said to be the father of {{ill|lt=Ikagashikome-no-Mikoto|Q10885176|WD=Q10885176|1=Ikagashikome}}, {{ill|lt=empress|Q7723211|WD=Q7723211|1=Empress consort}} of {{ill|lt=Emperor Kaika|Q333548|WD=Q333548|1=Emperor Kaika}}, and regarded as ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Mononobe clan|Q1755836|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe no Muraji|1=Mononobe clan}}. === Transportation === *5 minutes on foot from "Takada" bus stop on {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397|WD=Q6810397|1=Meitetsu Bus}} **From {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589|WD=Q2856589|1=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station}} / {{ill|lt=Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495|WD=Q871495|1=Owari-Ichinomiya Station}} (platform 3 of Meitetsu Ichinomiya bus terminal): bound for "Yamasato Nishi" or "{{ill|lt=Twin Arch 138|Q11318660|WD=Q11318660|lt=138 Tower Park|1=Twin Arch 138}}" === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たかたはさきしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]][[Category:qq]]

== Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6180005009988 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市高田南屋敷116', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=27 October 2014 (Mon) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = Takadahasagi Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}{{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada|1=Takada}} Minamiyashiki 116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} | 創建 = unknown | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Takada
Hasagi Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takadahasagi Shrine''' (たかだはさぎじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada|1=Takada}}, {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. Its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. It is presumed to correspond to "Hasagi Shrine" in Nakashima District of {{ill|lt=Owari Province|Q514506|WD=Q514506|1=Owari Province}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. === Overview === *Founding period unknown. *In the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|WD=Q334845|1=Muromachi period}}, Hasagi Shrine declined and the sacred body was temporarily moved to Shōhachimangū in Monma Village of {{ill|lt=Haguri District|Q1032507|WD=Q1032507|1=Haguri District}} (now {{ill|lt=Ifuribe Shrine|Q11379320|WD=Q11379320|1=Ifuribe Shrine}}). *In the early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, {{ill|lt=Hachiman|Q261637|WD=Q261637|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Hachiman}} was enshrined at the former Hasagi Shrine site, and it became Hachiman-sha. *In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}} (Meiji 5) it became a village shrine, and in {{ill|lt=1932|Q18743|WD=Q18743|1=1932}} (Shōwa 7) it became a gōsha. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} *:Said to be the father of {{ill|lt=Ikagashikome-no-Mikoto|Q10885176|WD=Q10885176|1=Ikagashikome}}, {{ill|lt=empress|Q7723211|WD=Q7723211|1=Empress consort}} of {{ill|lt=Emperor Kaika|Q333548|WD=Q333548|1=Emperor Kaika}}, and regarded as ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Mononobe clan|Q1755836|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe no Muraji|1=Mononobe clan}}. === Transportation === *5 minutes on foot from "Takada" bus stop on {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397|WD=Q6810397|1=Meitetsu Bus}} **From {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589|WD=Q2856589|1=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station}} / {{ill|lt=Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495|WD=Q871495|1=Owari-Ichinomiya Station}} (platform 3 of Meitetsu Ichinomiya bus terminal): bound for "Yamasato Nishi" or "{{ill|lt=Twin Arch 138|Q11318660|WD=Q11318660|lt=138 Tower Park|1=Twin Arch 138}}" === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]][[Category:qq]]

== Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6180005009988 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市高田南屋敷116', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=27 October 2014 (Mon) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = Takadahasagi Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}{{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada|1=Takada}} Minamiyashiki 116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} | 創建 = unknown | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Takada
Hasagi Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takadahasagi Shrine''' (たかだはさぎじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada|1=Takada}}, {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. Its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. It is presumed to correspond to "Hasagi Shrine" in Nakashima District of {{ill|lt=Owari Province|Q514506|WD=Q514506|1=Owari Province}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. === Overview === *Founding period unknown. *In the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|WD=Q334845|1=Muromachi period}}, Hasagi Shrine declined and the sacred body was temporarily moved to Shōhachimangū in Monma Village of {{ill|lt=Haguri District|Q1032507|WD=Q1032507|1=Haguri District}} (now {{ill|lt=Ifuribe Shrine|Q11379320|WD=Q11379320|1=Ifuribe Shrine}}). *In the early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, {{ill|lt=Hachiman|Q261637|WD=Q261637|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Hachiman}} was enshrined at the former Hasagi Shrine site, and it became Hachiman-sha. *In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}} (Meiji 5) it became a village shrine, and in {{ill|lt=1932|Q18743|WD=Q18743|1=1932}} (Shōwa 7) it became a gōsha. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} *:Said to be the father of {{ill|lt=Ikagashikome-no-Mikoto|Q10885176|WD=Q10885176|1=Ikagashikome}}, {{ill|lt=empress|Q7723211|WD=Q7723211|1=Empress consort}} of {{ill|lt=Emperor Kaika|Q333548|WD=Q333548|1=Emperor Kaika}}, and regarded as ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Mononobe clan|Q1755836|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe no Muraji|1=Mononobe clan}}. === Transportation === *5 minutes on foot from "Takada" bus stop on {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397|WD=Q6810397|1=Meitetsu Bus}} **From {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589|WD=Q2856589|1=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station}} / {{ill|lt=Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495|WD=Q871495|1=Owari-Ichinomiya Station}} (platform 3 of Meitetsu Ichinomiya bus terminal): bound for "Yamasato Nishi" or "{{ill|lt=Twin Arch 138|Q11318660|WD=Q11318660|lt=138 Tower Park|1=Twin Arch 138}}" === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]]

== Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6180005009988 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市高田南屋敷116', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=27 October 2014 (Mon) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = Takadahasagi Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}{{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada|1=Takada}} Minamiyashiki 116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} | 創建 = unknown | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Takada
Hasagi Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takadahasagi Shrine''' (たかだはさぎじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada|1=Takada}}, {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. Its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. It is presumed to correspond to "Hasagi Shrine" in Nakashima District of {{ill|lt=Owari Province|Q514506|WD=Q514506|1=Owari Province}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. === Overview === *Founding period unknown. *In the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|WD=Q334845|1=Muromachi period}}, Hasagi Shrine declined and the sacred body was temporarily moved to Shōhachimangū in Monma Village of {{ill|lt=Haguri District|Q1032507|WD=Q1032507|1=Haguri District}} (now {{ill|lt=Ifuribe Shrine|Q11379320|WD=Q11379320|1=Ifuribe Shrine}}). *In the early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, {{ill|lt=Hachiman|Q261637|WD=Q261637|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Hachiman}} was enshrined at the former Hasagi Shrine site, and it became Hachiman-sha. *In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}} (Meiji 5) it became a village shrine, and in {{ill|lt=1932|Q18743|WD=Q18743|1=1932}} (Shōwa 7) it became a gōsha. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} *:Said to be the father of {{ill|lt=Ikagashikome-no-Mikoto|Q10885176|WD=Q10885176|1=Ikagashikome}}, {{ill|lt=empress|Q7723211|WD=Q7723211|1=Empress consort}} of {{ill|lt=Emperor Kaika|Q333548|WD=Q333548|1=Emperor Kaika}}, and regarded as ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Mononobe clan|Q1755836|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe no Muraji|1=Mononobe clan}}. === Transportation === *5 minutes on foot from "Takada" bus stop on {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397|WD=Q6810397|1=Meitetsu Bus}} **From {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589|WD=Q2856589|1=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station}} / {{ill|lt=Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495|WD=Q871495|1=Owari-Ichinomiya Station}} (platform 3 of Meitetsu Ichinomiya bus terminal): bound for "Yamasato Nishi" or "{{ill|lt=Twin Arch 138|Q11318660|WD=Q11318660|lt=138 Tower Park|1=Twin Arch 138}}" === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ichinomiya, Aichi]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社|論]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]]
