== Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6180005009988 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市高田南屋敷116', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=27 October 2014 (Mon) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = Takadahasagi Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}{{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada|1=Takada}} Minamiyashiki 116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} | 創建 = unknown | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Takada
Hasagi Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takadahasagi Shrine''' (たかだはさぎじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada|1=Takada}}, {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. Its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. It is presumed to correspond to "Hasagi Shrine" in Nakashima District of {{ill|lt=Owari Province|Q514506|WD=Q514506|1=Owari Province}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. === Overview === *Founding period unknown. *In the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|WD=Q334845|1=Muromachi period}}, Hasagi Shrine declined and the sacred body was temporarily moved to Shōhachimangū in Monma Village of {{ill|lt=Haguri District|Q1032507|WD=Q1032507|1=Haguri District}} (now {{ill|lt=Ifuribe Shrine|Q11379320|WD=Q11379320|1=Ifuribe Shrine}}). *In the early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, {{ill|lt=Hachiman|Q261637|WD=Q261637|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Hachiman}} was enshrined at the former Hasagi Shrine site, and it became Hachiman-sha. *In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}} (Meiji 5) it became a village shrine, and in {{ill|lt=1932|Q18743|WD=Q18743|1=1932}} (Shōwa 7) it became a gōsha. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} *:Said to be the father of {{ill|lt=Ikagashikome-no-Mikoto|Q10885176|WD=Q10885176|1=Ikagashikome}}, {{ill|lt=empress|Q7723211|WD=Q7723211|1=Empress consort}} of {{ill|lt=Emperor Kaika|Q333548|WD=Q333548|1=Emperor Kaika}}, and regarded as ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Mononobe clan|Q1755836|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe no Muraji|1=Mononobe clan}}. === Transportation === *5 minutes on foot from "Takada" bus stop on {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397|WD=Q6810397|1=Meitetsu Bus}} **From {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589|WD=Q2856589|1=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station}} / {{ill|lt=Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495|WD=Q871495|1=Owari-Ichinomiya Station}} (platform 3 of Meitetsu Ichinomiya bus terminal): bound for "Yamasato Nishi" or "{{ill|lt=Twin Arch 138|Q11318660|WD=Q11318660|lt=138 Tower Park|1=Twin Arch 138}}" === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ichinomiya, Aichi]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]]

== Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6180005009988 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市高田南屋敷116', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=27 October 2014 (Mon) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = Takadahasagi Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}{{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada|1=Takada}} Minamiyashiki 116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} | 創建 = unknown | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Takada
Hasagi Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takadahasagi Shrine''' (たかだはさぎじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada|1=Takada}}, {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. Its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. It is presumed to correspond to "Hasagi Shrine" in Nakashima District of {{ill|lt=Owari Province|Q514506|WD=Q514506|1=Owari Province}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. === Overview === *Founding period unknown. *In the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|WD=Q334845|1=Muromachi period}}, Hasagi Shrine declined and the sacred body was temporarily moved to Shōhachimangū in Monma Village of {{ill|lt=Haguri District|Q1032507|WD=Q1032507|1=Haguri District}} (now {{ill|lt=Ifuribe Shrine|Q11379320|WD=Q11379320|1=Ifuribe Shrine}}). *In the early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, {{ill|lt=Hachiman|Q261637|WD=Q261637|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Hachiman}} was enshrined at the former Hasagi Shrine site, and it became Hachiman-sha. *In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}} (Meiji 5) it became a village shrine, and in {{ill|lt=1932|Q18743|WD=Q18743|1=1932}} (Shōwa 7) it became a gōsha. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} *:Said to be the father of {{ill|lt=Ikagashikome-no-Mikoto|Q10885176|WD=Q10885176|1=Ikagashikome}}, {{ill|lt=empress|Q7723211|WD=Q7723211|1=Empress consort}} of {{ill|lt=Emperor Kaika|Q333548|WD=Q333548|1=Emperor Kaika}}, and regarded as ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Mononobe clan|Q1755836|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe no Muraji|1=Mononobe clan}}. === Transportation === *5 minutes on foot from "Takada" bus stop on {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397|WD=Q6810397|1=Meitetsu Bus}} **From {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589|WD=Q2856589|1=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station}} / {{ill|lt=Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495|WD=Q871495|1=Owari-Ichinomiya Station}} (platform 3 of Meitetsu Ichinomiya bus terminal): bound for "Yamasato Nishi" or "{{ill|lt=Twin Arch 138|Q11318660|WD=Q11318660|lt=138 Tower Park|1=Twin Arch 138}}" === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ichinomiya, Aichi]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Aichi Prefecture]]

== Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6180005009988 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市高田南屋敷116', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=27 October 2014 (Mon) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = Takadahasagi Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}{{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada|1=Takada}} Minamiyashiki 116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} | 創建 = unknown | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Takada
Hasagi Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takadahasagi Shrine''' (たかだはさぎじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada|1=Takada}}, {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. Its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. It is presumed to correspond to "Hasagi Shrine" in Nakashima District of {{ill|lt=Owari Province|Q514506|WD=Q514506|1=Owari Province}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. === Overview === *Founding period unknown. *In the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|WD=Q334845|1=Muromachi period}}, Hasagi Shrine declined and the sacred body was temporarily moved to Shōhachimangū in Monma Village of {{ill|lt=Haguri District|Q1032507|WD=Q1032507|1=Haguri District}} (now {{ill|lt=Ifuribe Shrine|Q11379320|WD=Q11379320|1=Ifuribe Shrine}}). *In the early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, {{ill|lt=Hachiman|Q261637|WD=Q261637|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Hachiman}} was enshrined at the former Hasagi Shrine site, and it became Hachiman-sha. *In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}} (Meiji 5) it became a village shrine, and in {{ill|lt=1932|Q18743|WD=Q18743|1=1932}} (Shōwa 7) it became a gōsha. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} *:Said to be the father of {{ill|lt=Ikagashikome-no-Mikoto|Q10885176|WD=Q10885176|1=Ikagashikome}}, {{ill|lt=empress|Q7723211|WD=Q7723211|1=Empress consort}} of {{ill|lt=Emperor Kaika|Q333548|WD=Q333548|1=Emperor Kaika}}, and regarded as ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Mononobe clan|Q1755836|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe no Muraji|1=Mononobe clan}}. === Transportation === *5 minutes on foot from "Takada" bus stop on {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397|WD=Q6810397|1=Meitetsu Bus}} **From {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589|WD=Q2856589|1=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station}} / {{ill|lt=Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495|WD=Q871495|1=Owari-Ichinomiya Station}} (platform 3 of Meitetsu Ichinomiya bus terminal): bound for "Yamasato Nishi" or "{{ill|lt=Twin Arch 138|Q11318660|WD=Q11318660|lt=138 Tower Park|1=Twin Arch 138}}" === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ichinomiya, Aichi]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Aichi Prefecture]]

== Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6180005009988 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市高田南屋敷116', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高田波蘇伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11672161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=27 October 2014 (Mon) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称 = Takadahasagi Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Takata-hasagi-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}{{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada|1=Takada}} Minamiyashiki 116 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} | 創建 = unknown | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Takada
Hasagi Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takadahasagi Shrine''' (たかだはさぎじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Takada (Ichinomiya)|Q128848560|WD=Q128848560|lt=Takada|1=Takada}}, {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|WD=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. Its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. It is presumed to correspond to "Hasagi Shrine" in Nakashima District of {{ill|lt=Owari Province|Q514506|WD=Q514506|1=Owari Province}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. === Overview === *Founding period unknown. *In the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|WD=Q334845|1=Muromachi period}}, Hasagi Shrine declined and the sacred body was temporarily moved to Shōhachimangū in Monma Village of {{ill|lt=Haguri District|Q1032507|WD=Q1032507|1=Haguri District}} (now {{ill|lt=Ifuribe Shrine|Q11379320|WD=Q11379320|1=Ifuribe Shrine}}). *In the early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, {{ill|lt=Hachiman|Q261637|WD=Q261637|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Hachiman}} was enshrined at the former Hasagi Shrine site, and it became Hachiman-sha. *In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}} (Meiji 5) it became a village shrine, and in {{ill|lt=1932|Q18743|WD=Q18743|1=1932}} (Shōwa 7) it became a gōsha. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtsuoki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} *:Said to be the father of {{ill|lt=Ikagashikome-no-Mikoto|Q10885176|WD=Q10885176|1=Ikagashikome}}, {{ill|lt=empress|Q7723211|WD=Q7723211|1=Empress consort}} of {{ill|lt=Emperor Kaika|Q333548|WD=Q333548|1=Emperor Kaika}}, and regarded as ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Mononobe clan|Q1755836|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe no Muraji|1=Mononobe clan}}. === Transportation === *5 minutes on foot from "Takada" bus stop on {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397|WD=Q6810397|1=Meitetsu Bus}} **From {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589|WD=Q2856589|1=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station}} / {{ill|lt=Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495|WD=Q871495|1=Owari-Ichinomiya Station}} (platform 3 of Meitetsu Ichinomiya bus terminal): bound for "Yamasato Nishi" or "{{ill|lt=Twin Arch 138|Q11318660|WD=Q11318660|lt=138 Tower Park|1=Twin Arch 138}}" === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takadahasagi Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ichinomiya, Aichi]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in
